prestazioni: Replace the stock 2.0L supercharged *Lancia Tipo 233 ATR* (105 kW / 142 PS) engine internals with forged *JE Pistons* 8.5:1 compression ratio slugs, *Manley* H-beam connecting rods, and a *Crower* billet crankshaft to handle 1.5 bar of boost from a *Rotrex C38-91* centrifugal supercharger (replacing the stock Abarth Volumex blower) with a *PWR* water-to-air intercooler core mounted in the front bumper duct.

Install a *Motec M150* standalone ECU with individual cylinder fuel trims, *ID1000x* injectors, and a *Bosch Motorsport* 0280158001 high-pressure fuel pump (250 lph) to support 450+ hp on VP Racing Q16 fuel, paired with a *Tial MV-R* 50mm wastegate and *Sparco* 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with *Bosal* 2.5-inch center section and *Scorpion* 3-inch rear mufflers.

Upgrade the stock *ZF* 5-speed dogleg gearbox with a *Hewland* FT200 sequential transaxle (Group B-spec), *Quaife* ATB differential, and *Tilton* twin-plate ceramic clutch, while reinforcing the rear subframe with *Custom Cages* chromoly triangulated braces and *Polybush* spherical bearing mounts for the *Ohlins TTX40* 3-way adjustable coilovers (22mm front / 24mm rear sway bars).
estetica: Replace the stock fiberglass body panels with *RML Group* carbon-Kevlar replicas (originally used on the 037 Rally), featuring a *Rocket Bunny* widebody conversion (30mm front / 50mm rear fender flares) and *AeroCatch* quick-release hood latches for the *Seibon* carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA duct for the *PWR* intercooler.

Install *OMP* 8-point bolt-in FIA-spec roll cage (with *Sparco* 6-point harness bar) and *Recaro* Pole Position seats (carbon-Kevlar shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified) wrapped in *Sabelt* 6-point harnesses, while relocating the battery to the trunk with a *Braille* lithium-ion unit and *Painless Performance* fuse/relay panel.

Fit *BBS* E50 magnesium wheels (16x9.5 front / 16x11 rear) with *Pirelli P Zero Corsa* tires (225/50R16 front / 285/40R16 rear), *AP Racing* 6-piston front / 4-piston rear calipers with *Ferodo DS2500* pads, and *Goodridge* braided stainless steel brake lines, complemented by *Hella* Rallye 700FF driving lights and *Magneti Marelli* historic-spec LED taillights.
